title: The Beirut / Lebanon Attack
summary: Unimetrix 1's account of the 2020 Beirut explosion as an engineered event.
markdown:
The **Beirut / Lebanon Attack** is the subject of the dedicated August 5, 2020 session,
*Unimetrix Talks About the Lebanon Attack*, in which Unimetrix 1 gives its account of the
August 2020 explosion in Beirut.

In its telling the event was not an accident but an engineered "side-operation" — a psyop
following the [problem → reaction → solution](/lore/problem-reaction-solution/) pattern. It
attributes the explosion to a "particle beam weapon" fired from an antigravity craft it calls
"TR-3 Astra," part of the [Secret Space Program](/lore/secret-space-program/), and frames it as
a move in a larger contest for "power and control" involving the
[Nazi Reichs](/lore/nazi-faction/) and a U.S.–China axis.

The Beirut session is a compact example of how Unimetrix 1 reads a specific world event —
folding a single incident into its whole model of hidden power and manufactured crisis.
